absorption: ASK absorption detected near 60900. A large positive delta bar (+1K) failed to produce a higher price, indicating sellers absorbed the buying pressure.
dom_observation: Large stacked ask walls at 60900 and 61000 are capping the upside. Bids are thinner below.
reasoning: Fiyat, vPOC seviyesinde guclu pozitif deltaya ragmen yukselmeyi basaramadi (ASK Absorption), bu da alici gucunun tukendigini ve saticilarin kontrolu ele aldigini gosteriyor.
